name: Silk crossbody bag
description:
If you’re a fan of Hermès’ silk carrés, you’ll love Hermès’ Black Kelly en Perles Silky PM Crossbody! This chic carry features the Kelly en Perles scarf motif in dark jewel tones against a background of black with black Barenia leather reinforced corners, trim, and adjustable palladium buckle-and-tang strap shown with an 18-inch crossbody drop. The open top folds over on itself with the aid of a weighted clochette and opens to navy silk lining with a zipped pouch. In very good condition with a dustbag, it has wear on the corners, edges, leather, and inside. This slim-line bag is a slouchy piece that’s lightweight and just plain fun to carry!
 
 
 



Product ID:
HR.Z0324.13


Measurements/Size:
13"W x 13"H x 0.5"D
